name: Horizon Reign
description:
Lots of massive constructions floating in the air.
It seems that you are inside of one of these. 
Everything here looks different, It's like to wake
up to a new way to see the world. Here everything 
you have in mind is possible. But be careful, the 
paradox spirits are watching every move!

exits.description: It looks like a long way down...to somewhere already very known =D
